mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_group (id, name, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM study_group WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT g.id, g.name, g.description, g.created_by AS createdBy, g.created_at AS createdAt, g.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM study_group g JOIN study_member m ON g.id = m.study_id WHERE m.user_email = #{userEmail}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_member (id, study_id, user_email, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{studyId}, #{userEmail}, #{role}, #{joinedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, study_id AS studyId, user_email AS userEmail, role, joined_at AS joinedAt FROM study_member WHERE study_id = #{studyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_invite (id, study_id, inviter_email, invitee_email, status, invited_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{studyId}, #{inviterEmail}, #{inviteeEmail}, #{status}, #{invitedAt})
INSERT INTO shared_essay (id, study_id, user_email, workspace_id, version_ids, shared_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{studyId}, #{userEmail}, #{workspaceId}, #{versionIds}, #{sharedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT se.id, se.study_id AS studyId, se.user_email AS userEmail, se.workspace_id AS workspaceId, se.version_ids AS versionIds, se.shared_at AS sharedAt, c.name AS companyName, j.title AS positionTitle, j.deadline_label AS deadlineLabel FROM shared_essay se LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = se.workspace_id LEFT JOIN basket_jobs bj ON bj.id = w.basket_job_id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON j.id = bj.job_id LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.id = j.company_id WHERE se.study_id = #{studyId} ORDER BY se.shared_at DESC

SELECT se.id, se.study_id AS studyId, se.user_email AS userEmail, se.workspace_id AS workspaceId, se.version_ids AS versionIds, se.shared_at AS sharedAt, c.name AS companyName, j.title AS positionTitle, j.deadline_label AS deadlineLabel FROM shared_essay se LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = se.workspace_id LEFT JOIN basket_jobs bj ON bj.id = w.basket_job_id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON j.id = bj.job_id LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.id = j.company_id WHERE se.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO essay_feedback (id, shared_essay_id, author_email, content, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{sharedEssayId}, #{authorEmail}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, shared_essay_id AS sharedEssayId, author_email AS authorEmail, content, created_at AS createdAt FROM essay_feedback WHERE shared_essay_id = #{sharedEssayId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shared_job (id, study_id, recommender_email, company_name, position_title, deadline_label, source_url, recommended_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{studyId}, #{recommenderEmail}, #{companyName}, #{positionTitle}, #{deadlineLabel}, #{sourceUrl}, #{recommendedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, study_id AS studyId, recommender_email AS recommenderEmail, company_name AS companyName, position_title AS positionTitle, deadline_label AS deadlineLabel, source_url AS sourceUrl, recommended_at AS recommendedAt FROM shared_job WHERE study_id = #{studyId}
